since_last: 38% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.24%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.16% · BTC -0.51% · Gold +2.07% · Nasdaq100 -0.13%. 38% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.24%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.24%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +23.43%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +23.43%, DELL +9.76%, HPE +4.41%, NRG +4.23%, AVAV +3.79%. Laggards: PATH -12.87%, GEV -7.72%, NOW -5.76%, PLTR -5.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.04% at $121.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.04% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
